TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_waliyu, title = waliyu, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/waliyu} }

S.FORM: u Tay-pin-yang a bayu, patizeng tu baluhay a kamu sa u waliyu .
S.PHON: u taj-pin-jaŋ a baju, patizəŋ tu bar~ɾuħaj a kamu sa u war~ɾiju .
S.FORM: u Tay-pin-yang a bayu, patizeng tu baluhay a kamu sa u waliyu .
S.PHON: u taj-pin-jaŋ a baju, patizəŋ tu bar~ɾuħaj a kamu sa u war~ɾiju .
